title: Caramelized Mushroom Salad
description: A simple and flavorful salad featuring caramelized mushrooms, roasted chestnuts, and fresh greens.

ingredients.name: mixed greens
ingredients.notes: such as arugula, spinach, and lettuce

instructions: Toss the chestnuts with 1 tablespoon of olive oil and roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat. Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add 1 tablespoon of butter to the skillet and continue cooking the mushrooms until they are caramelized, stirring occasionally.
In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens, roasted chestnuts, and caramelized mushrooms.
Drizzle with your favorite salad dressing and serve.
